title:
Auckland city road kerblines and centrelines
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Auckland city road kerblines and centrelines
Could i please request the shapefile for the datasets for Kerblines and centrelines for Auckland city roads for a software development project for the company i work for.
the blockage in the testing phase
providing the data for testing purposes

### Response from Auckland Transport
Status More information required about request
Comments •	When referring to "Auckland City," we mean the entire Auckland Region. However, the data specifically for the Auckland CBD would also be helpful.
•	Regarding the kerbline request, we are looking for data on both the kerb and channel.

#### Likely Source Agency
